entry.title: Optimus Prime | Transformers Cinematic wall art | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

Cinematic Transformers-inspired artwork featuring Optimus Prime with intense glowing details and a bold futuristic battle aesthetic.

High-energy composition with metallic textures, dramatic lighting, and powerful typography designed to create an epic gaming and entertainment setup.


Product Details:

  • Printed on 300 GSM premium matte sheet
  • 3-panel split design for a cinematic wide-wall display
  • High-detail robotic artwork with futuristic styling
  • Bold blue, silver & red contrast tones
  • Frame not included

Perfect For:

  • Gaming & streaming setups
  • Transformers fans & collectors
  • Sci-fi themed room decor
  • Modern entertainment wall aesthetics

Note: Slight color variation may occur due to lighting and screen differences.

entry.title: 1967 Ford Mustang Fastback | Muscle Car | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

Dark cinematic artwork featuring the legendary 1967 Ford Mustang Fastback in a retro-modern monochrome aesthetic.

Designed with aggressive widebody styling, deep shadow lighting, and a premium black & silver tone palette that gives a bold automotive statement to any setup.


Product Details:

  • Printed on 300 GSM premium matte sheet
  • 3-panel split design for a cinematic wide display
  • High-detail monochrome muscle car artwork
  • Modern retro typography and dark aesthetic styling
  • Frame not included

Perfect For:

  • Car enthusiast desk setups
  • Gaming & workstation backgrounds
  • Modern monochrome room aesthetics
  • Classic Mustang collectors & muscle car fans

Note: Slight color variation may occur due to lighting and screen differences.

entry.title: Ford Mustang Boss 429 | Retro Muscle Car | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

Retro-modern muscle car artwork featuring the legendary Ford Mustang Boss 429 with bold typography, cinematic lighting, and a high-performance racing aesthetic.

Designed with deep black tones, vintage cream detailing, and aggressive orange accents to create a powerful statement setup for car enthusiasts and gaming rooms.


Product Details:

  • Printed on 300 GSM premium matte sheet
  • 3-panel split design for a cinematic wide look
  • High-detail retro muscle car artwork
  • Sharp typography and motorsport inspired layout
  • Frame not included

Perfect For:

  • Car enthusiast setups
  • Gaming & workstation backgrounds
  • Retro automotive themed rooms
  • Mustang & classic muscle car lovers

Note: Slight color variation may occur due to lighting and screen differences.

entry.title: Mercedes Benz 190E W201 | Classic Benz Street Art Set | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

The Mercedes-Benz 190E (W201) is a symbol of timeless engineering and unmistakable German luxury. Known for its precision handling, iconic boxy design, and legendary reliability, the 190E became one of the most respected compact performance sedans of its era.

This artwork captures the classic Benz attitude with a bold graffiti-style design set against a dramatic gothic mansion backdrop. The cinematic lighting, misty driveway reflections, and street-art typography create a powerful blend of luxury and street culture, making it the perfect centerpiece for any automotive enthusiast’s space.

Ideal for gaming rooms, car lovers, street-style interiors, and modern setups, this poster celebrates the legacy of one of Mercedes-Benz’s most iconic sedans.

Designed with a cinematic composition and elegant typography, this poster is perfect for luxury car enthusiasts, modern interiors, gaming setups, offices, and premium room décor.

✔ Premium high-definition artwork
✔ Perfect for luxury and automotive themed rooms
✔ Ideal gift for Rolls-Royce and exotic car lovers
✔ Elegant design that enhances any wall space

Bring the spirit of luxury, prestige, and timeless design to your wall with this Rolls-Royce Phantom poster.

entry.title: Rolls Royce Phantom | Car Set | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

Experience the ultimate expression of automotive elegance with this stunning Rolls-Royce Phantom wall poster. Set against a breathtaking coastal landscape with sparkling ocean waves and soft sunlight, this artwork captures the timeless beauty and prestige of one of the world’s most iconic luxury vehicles.

The Rolls-Royce Phantom stands as the pinnacle of automotive craftsmanship. Known for its unmatched comfort, handcrafted precision, and powerful V12 performance, the Phantom represents the perfect blend of sophistication and engineering excellence.

Designed with a cinematic composition and elegant typography, this poster is perfect for luxury car enthusiasts, modern interiors, gaming setups, offices, and premium room décor.

✔ Premium high-definition artwork
✔ Perfect for luxury and automotive themed rooms
✔ Ideal gift for Rolls-Royce and exotic car lovers
✔ Elegant design that enhances any wall space

Bring the spirit of luxury, prestige, and timeless design to your wall with this Rolls-Royce Phantom poster.

entry.title: LANCER LEGACY | Mitsubishi Lancer | CAR SET | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

Porsche GT3 –  Premium Art Poster

Unleash pure adrenaline on your wall with this striking Porsche GT3 race edition artwork. Designed with a bold red backdrop and gritty motorsport detailing, this poster captures the raw intensity of track-ready engineering and high-speed dominance.

Featuring the iconic wide-body Porsche GT3, aggressive aero kit, Hankook race tyres, and razor-sharp decals, this piece brings together precision, power, and passion in one electrifying composition. Paired with the quote “Drive it like you stole it,” this artwork embodies fearless energy and unapologetic attitude — making it a fan-favorite for car lovers.

Printed on premium, fade-resistant paper with studio-grade clarity, this poster is built to stand out in bedrooms, gaming setups, garages, man caves, and collector galleries.
entry.s:tag: Drive It Like You Stole It

entry.title: FORTUNER x Build to Dominate | Car Set | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

Premium high-definition wall poster of TOYOTA FORTUNER | Car Set | 3-Piece Set, designed to instantly elevate the power and premium vibe of your room.

Printed on ultra-thick 300 GSM matte photo paper for deep colours, razor-sharp detailing, and a smooth anti-glare finish. Durable, fade-resistant, and crafted to deliver a bold, premium wall presence with zero effort.

This poster blends seamlessly into bedrooms, living rooms, gaming setups, offices, or man caves, adding a strong automotive and luxury SUV aesthetic. Easy to frame, perfect for collage walls, and ideal for those who love premium cars, clean design, and high-quality prints.

A perfect choice for personal décor or gifting — made for Fortuner fans who want their walls to reflect power, style, and attitude.

entry.title: Nissan Skyline GOZILLA | Car Set | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

Unleash the beast on your wall with this dramatic Nissan Skyline GT-R “Godzilla” 3-piece split panel poster.
Combining the legendary R35 with the iconic silhouette of Godzilla rising behind a destroyed city, this artwork delivers pure adrenaline and attitude. The monochrome palette, bold brush-stroke typography, and cinematic composition give the poster a gritty, destructive, high-performance vibe worthy of the GT-R name.

Featuring the car’s wide-body stance, massive rear wing, and aggressive exhaust layout, this piece celebrates one of the most feared machines in the automotive world. Perfect for gaming rooms, desk setups, studios, garages, and any car lover’s collection.

Printed across multiple panels for a wide, impactful display, this poster stands out as both art and tribute to the legend known as Godzilla.

entry.title: Drive IT | Porsche | CAR SET | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

Porsche GT3 – “Drive It Like You Stole It” Premium Art Poster

Unleash pure adrenaline on your wall with this striking Porsche GT3 race edition artwork. Designed with a bold red backdrop and gritty motorsport detailing, this poster captures the raw intensity of track-ready engineering and high-speed dominance.

Featuring the iconic wide-body Porsche GT3, aggressive aero kit, Hankook race tyres, and razor-sharp decals, this piece brings together precision, power, and passion in one electrifying composition. Paired with the quote “Drive it like you stole it,” this artwork embodies fearless energy and unapologetic attitude — making it a fan-favorite for car lovers.

Printed on premium, fade-resistant paper with studio-grade clarity, this poster is built to stand out in bedrooms, gaming setups, garages, man caves, and collector galleries.
entry.s:tag: Drive It Like You Stole It
